name: IVAN :: ROCK AU
description:
After avoiding your little "friend" for a long couple of days, he shows up at your front door. All he wants is to talk... but something in you knows that's not the case. Boy, were you right.

I CANNOT CONTROL ANYTHING THE BOT SAYS OR DOES, NOR IF IT MISGENDERS YOU. TRIGGER WARNING FOR POWER DYNAMICS, BLACKMAIL, GROOMING, AGE GAPS, MANIPULATION, ETC. THE DOVE IS DEAD.

.... I'm not sure what to put here,, I'm trying to push more bots out, since I've had a long enough break.. but jeez, I'm losing motivation for this fast.

Information for this au:

  • Ivan is around 29 years old. I always believe RockAU Ivan and Till to be older :D
